title: Map In Slot
description: Small mod to make maps render in inventory/hotbar slots
body:
# Map In Slot

Simple mod to render filled map in the hotbar/inventory slots. So you don't have to keep look at each map individually when moving them around.

![Map in slot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Crec0/map-in-slot/main/assets/img.png)


# Enhancements

This mod is greatly complemented by [client-maps](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-maps)
